docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOLLEY, SHANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JORDAN, RONALD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
